title: Branch protection: strict_required_status_checks_policy=true on main (race-condition fix)

evidence.ref: PR #65 cycle-30 merged after D015 with stale CI

examples: Effect: dumb-agent automerge workflow's gh pr merge --auto now waits until PR is rebased AND its CI re-passes. If main tightens a check
all queued PRs must rebase + repass — closing the race window that produced cycle-30 noise.
